---
title: "Film Photography"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    lightbox: true
---

A collection of 35mm film photography. Ordered generally by when I took them. 

## Gallery One

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![](<pictures/for_site (1).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (2).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (3).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (4).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (5).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (6).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (7).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (8).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (9).jpg>)
:::

## Gallery Two

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](<pictures/for_site (10).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (11).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (12).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (13).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (14).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (15).jpg>)
:::

## Gallery Three

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![](<pictures/for_site (16).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (17).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (18).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (19).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (20).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (21).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (22).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (23).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (24).jpg>)
:::

## Gallery Four

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![](<pictures/for_site (25).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (26).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (27).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (28).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (29).jpg>)

![](<pictures/for_site (30).jpg>)
:::
